title: Nursery Rhyme. LI. Tales.
content:
There was a fat man of Bombay,
        Who was smoking one sunshiny day,
        When a bird, called a snipe,
        Flew away with his pipe,
        Which vex'd the fat man of Bombay.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. LI. Tales."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
